data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Terengganu and Western Sarawak until 1:00PM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, N. Sembilan, Melaka, Johor, Terengganu dan Sarawak Barat sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, southern part of Samui, Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, southern part of Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan and Sulu until 1:00PM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, selatan Samui, Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, selatan Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 1:00 tengah hari; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Saturday, 27 June 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Sabtu, 27 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Yan, Pendang, Kuala Muda, Sik, Baling, Kulim and Bandar Baharu);  Penang  (North Seberang Perai, Central Seberang Perai and South Seberang Perai); and  Perak  (Kerian, Larut, Matang and Selama, Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Perak Tengah, Bagan Datuk and Hilir Perak) until 3:00PM; Wednesday, 24 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Kota Setar, Pokok Sena, Yan, Pendang, Kuala Muda, Sik, Baling, Kulim dan Bandar Baharu);  Pulau Pinang  (Seberang Perai Utara, Seberang Perai Tengah dan Seberang Perai Selatan); dan  Perak  (Kerian, Larut, Matang Dan Selama, Kuala Kangsar, Manjung, Perak Tengah, Bagan Datuk dan Hilir Perak) sehingga 3:00 petang; Rabu, 24 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
